front: What is metagenomics and antimicrobial peptide discovery?
back: Metagenomics sequences DNA from environmental samples without culturing. For AMPs: 1) Mining uncultured microbial genomes for novel AMP genes, 2) Studying microbiome defensive peptide repertoires, 3) Discovering AMPs from extreme environments (deep sea, hot springs), 4) Functional metagenomics screening.
